note: Verify after CP11 (two edge-case bug fixes from external Codex review). Both fixes covered by real assertions; AC #4 strengthened; no AC regressed. Security carried forward: both changes tighten validation / add an error catch (reduce surface, add none). 2 new advisories + carried deferrals.

findings.message: Residual of the same class as fixed bug #1: validate_url now rejects control chars (<0x20, 0x7F) but still accepts high-codepoint characters (>0xFF). Werkzeug's Location header is latin-1-encoded, so a target URL with a non-latin-1 codepoint could still raise at redirect time (500). Lower risk than CRLF (needs an operator to submit a raw non-ASCII URL) and blocks no AC.
findings.remediation: Optional follow-up: require URLs to be ASCII (RFC 3986 — non-ASCII should be percent-encoded/IDN by the client), closing the whole malformed-URL->redirect-500 class in one rule. Not done here to stay within CP11's approved scope.

findings.message: The delete-race test monkeypatches db.insert_click to raise IntegrityError (proves the handler's except->404), rather than exercising a real FK cascade delete between get_code and insert_click. Fair mechanism-level proxy (real cascade does raise this exact error), but not a true end-to-end race.
findings.remediation: Optional: an integration test that deletes the code on a second connection after the handler's read and asserts 404 end-to-end.

findings.message: [carried, deferred] No MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH on create_app; POST /api/codes buffers the full body before validation. Authenticated-only. Defense-in-depth.
findings.remediation: Set app.config['MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH'] to a small cap (e.g. 16*1024).

findings.message: [carried, deferred] Referer/User-Agent stored verbatim and echoed in stats JSON. Safe as JSON; latent XSS only with a future HTML UI.
findings.remediation: Keep serving as JSON; HTML-escape at render if a UI is added.
